event.title: GHMX Convention Staff Portal
event.summary: GHMX (GameX) is an all-ages Gaming, Hobby & Model Expo hosted at the Brisbane Showgrounds. This portal manages staff access, model judging, volunteer intake, and logistics maps.
event.venue: Exhibition Building, Brisbane Showgrounds, 601 Gregory Terrace, Bowen Hills QLD 4006
event.dates: Latest published event window: 22-23 November 2025, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM
